stats.fixedLabel: Scope, timeline, and pricing before build starts

products.title: The complete toolkit, under one studio.
products.subtitle: Pick what fits. We handle the rest.

process.title: Simple process. No surprises.
process.subtitle: You always know what's happening, what's next, and what it costs.

about.title: A studio run like a product, not an agency.
about.p1: Vetd is a small, focused team building websites, apps, and systems for businesses that want to grow. No bloat. No bureaucracy. Just finished work, shipped on time.
about.p2: We price by scope, not by the hour. We build on tools that win. And when the project ends, you own every line of it.

ship.title: We ship products, not hours
ship.copy: Fixed scopes, fixed prices, finished work. No open-ended retainers, no billable-hour games.

speed.title: Speed is a feature
speed.copy: A marketing site in 7 days. An MVP in weeks. Momentum compounds. Slow projects rarely recover.

tools.title: We pick tools that win
tools.copy: Next.js, Flutter, Supabase, shadcn, Claude. Proven stacks only. No framework-of-the-month experiments on your budget.

ownership.title: You own everything
ownership.copy: Code, domain, accounts, content. No lock-in, no dependencies on us to keep the lights on.

remote.title: Remote by default
remote.copy: Clients across industries, time zones, and markets, held to the same standard of craft and communication.

straight.title: Straight answers, always
straight.copy: If something can't be done, we tell you early. No jargon, no hedging, no vendor-speak.

work.title: Products we've built and shipped.
work.empty: No projects in this category yet.

financing.title: Pay over time. Zero interest.
financing.intro: We split the cost of your project into a small deposit and a fixed monthly payment. No banks, no credit checks, no fees added on top. Available on builds starting at ${min}.

interest.label: Interest
interest.copy: What you see is what you pay. Nothing added on top.

deposit.label: Deposit
deposit.copy: We start the moment it lands. The rest is split monthly.

term.label: Term
term.copy: Spread the balance across a year. Pay early any time.

cost.q: How much will my project cost?
cost.a: Websites start at $97/mo or as a one-time build. Mobile apps and SaaS products are quoted per scope on the discovery call. You'll leave the call with a concrete range. No guesswork, no follow-up pitches.

who.a: You work directly with the founder and lead developer. No account managers, no offshore subcontractors. Every line of code and every design decision is ours.

payment.a: Every project kicks off with a 30% deposit. For builds $5,000 and up, you can pay the 70% balance on delivery or split it over 12 months at 0% interest. Same total either way. No fees, no credit checks.

after.a: Website plans include ongoing hosting, SEO, and content updates. Apps and SaaS launches come with a 30-day warranty on bugs, plus optional monthly retainers if you want us to keep building.

ownership.q: Do I own the code, domain, and accounts?
ownership.a: Yes, everything is yours from day one. Code, domain, design files, hosting accounts, third-party integrations. You're never locked in, and you can take the project anywhere.

start.q: What do you need from me to start?
start.a: Just a 20-minute discovery call or the contact form. We respond within 24 hours with next steps. You don't need wireframes, a spec doc, or existing assets. We handle that.

cta.title: Ready to build something?
cta.subtitle: Tell us about your project. No commitment, no pressure.

marketing-website.name: Website
marketing-website.tagline: Get found. Look credible. Convert visitors.
marketing-website.description: A fast, mobile-first website built with SEO from day one. Designed to turn traffic into leads, calls, and sales. Available as a one-time build or monthly. Monthly includes ongoing SEO, Google Business, reports, and content updates.
pricingTiers: Growth: $247/mo — full SEO, content, reviews, monthly reports

mobile-app.name: Mobile App
mobile-app.description: Native iOS and Android apps built in Flutter. We take you from idea to App Store: architecture, design, development, and launch. Built for performance and scale.

web-app.name: SaaS Product
web-app.description: Custom SaaS products: booking platforms, client portals, admin dashboards, and subscription-ready apps. Built with Next.js and Supabase. Designed to ship fast and scale.

ai-integration.name: AI Integration
ai-integration.description: We add AI-powered features to any website, app, or tool: intelligent chatbots, personalized recommendations, content automation, and more. Powered by the latest models from Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google.

01.title: Discovery
01.copy: We learn your business, your goals, and what success looks like. This starts with a free 20-minute call. No pitch, no pressure.

02.title: Proposal
02.copy: You get a clear written scope, timeline, and price. No hourly billing, no hidden costs, and nothing starts until you approve it.

03.title: Design & Build
03.copy: We design and develop your product in focused sprints with regular check-ins. Feedback is part of the process, not an afterthought.

04.title: Launch
04.copy: We deploy, test, and handle final QA. When we hand it off, you own the code, domain, accounts, and data.

05.title: Support
05.copy: Need ongoing help? We offer monthly support, SEO management, and product maintenance. Or reach out whenever you need us.

tools.nextdotjs: Our go-to React framework for high-performance websites, web apps, and SEO-friendly builds.
tools.shadcnui: A composable component system we use to build interfaces that stay fast, consistent, and easy to extend.
tools.tailwindcss: Utility-first styling that lets us design and ship polished interfaces without slowing implementation down.
tools.vercel: Deployment and hosting infrastructure for fast releases, previews, and reliable production delivery.
tools.flutter: Cross-platform app framework for building mobile products with a single codebase and native-feeling UX.
tools.supabase: Backend platform we use for auth, databases, storage, and real-time features without heavy overhead.
tools.postgresql: The database layer behind structured, scalable products that need strong querying and long-term reliability.
tools.anthropic: AI models we integrate when products need advanced reasoning, assistants, or workflow automation.
tools.openai: A core AI platform in our stack for conversational features, automation, and intelligent product experiences.
tools.figma: Where product structure, interface systems, and design decisions get shaped before development starts.
tools.framer: Useful for fast-moving marketing builds, interactive prototypes, and visual storytelling on the web.

financing.metaDescription: Build now, pay over 12 months. In-house financing on projects $5K+. 30% deposit, monthly payments, no credit checks.
financing.intro: Every project kicks off with a {deposit}% deposit. For projects over ${min}, you can pay the 70% balance on delivery, or spread it over {months} months at 0%. Same total either way. No banks, no credit checks. Just a clear contract between us.
financing.trustIntro: Three things we commit to in writing, before the deposit clears.

zeroInterest.title: 0% interest
zeroInterest.copy: Same total either way. Split the 70% over 12 months or pay it on delivery. Never a cent more.

noCredit.title: No credit checks
noCredit.copy: We work off trust and a contract, not a loan application. No pulls, no scoring.

noSurprises.title: No contract surprises
noSurprises.copy: One clear agreement. Late-payment terms and default terms written in plain English.

scope.title: Scope the project
scope.copy: Free discovery call. We agree on scope, timeline, and price before anything moves.

deposit.title: 30% deposit kicks off
deposit.copy: Every project starts with a 30% deposit. One invoice, one payment. Build begins the same week.

choose.title: Choose how to pay the 70%
choose.copy: Either the full balance on delivery, or 12 equal monthly payments at 0%. Decide at signing.

deliver.title: Deliver, launch, own
deliver.copy: You use it from day one. Source code and full account handover when the balance is settled.

financing.pathsIntro: Example on a $10,000 project. $3,000 deposit either way. The 70% balance is where you choose.

pathA.title: Balance on delivery
pathA.copy: Classic two-payment structure. Pay the balance the week we deliver.

pathB.title: Balance over 12 months
pathB.copy: Same total as Path A, spread across the year. Start this month, pay as you use it.

calculator.title: Run your numbers
calculator.description: Enter a project amount to see the 30% deposit and 12 monthly payments at 0%.

qualifies.a: Any project quoted at $5,000 or more. We ask that your business has been operating at least 12 months. No paperwork, just the conversation.

loan.q: Is this a loan? Will you pull my credit?
loan.a: No. This is a payment agreement directly with us. No credit check, no credit bureau reporting. We work off a signed contract.

interest.a: Yes. On a $10,000 project, you'd pay the same $3,000 deposit either way. Then $583.33/mo for 12 months, or $7,000 on delivery. Both total $10,000. No interest, no financing fee, no hidden charges.

deposit.q: Do I need a deposit either way?
deposit.a: Yes. Every project, regardless of how you pay the balance, kicks off with a 30% deposit. This covers scoping, design, and the first sprint of build work. The 70% balance is where the two payment paths split.

free.q: Why would you offer this for free?
free.a: Because we'd rather help you ship now than lose the project to cash flow. We bet that you'll come back for the next one, and refer us to someone else.

early.q: What if I want to pay off early?
early.a: Pay it off anytime with no penalty. Settle the remaining balance and we close the account.

late.q: What happens if a payment fails?
late.a: We retry the card in 3 business days. After 30 days past due, work pauses and we pause access to hosting until it's resolved. We'd always rather talk than chase. Reach out if something changes.

ownership.q: What do I own while I'm still making payments?
ownership.a: You use the product from day one: hosting, domain, your working software. Source code and full account handover happens on the final payment.

financing.ctaSubtitle: Tell us about your project. We'll come back with what it costs and show you both payment paths. No pressure.
